mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.name, f.subtitle, f.birth_date, f.death_date, f.dynasty, f.birth_place, f.biography, f.works, f.image_url, f.created_at, f.updated_at FROM t_historical_figure f INNER JOIN t_daily_recommendation dr ON f.id = dr.content_id WHERE dr.recommend_date = #{date} LIMIT 1

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.subtitle, f.birth_date, f.death_date, f.dynasty, f.birth_place, f.biography, f.works, f.image_url, f.created_at, f.updated_at FROM t_historical_figure f WHERE f.id NOT IN ( SELECT dr.content_id FROM t_daily_recommendation dr ) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_historical_figure f WHERE f.id NOT IN ( SELECT dr.content_id FROM t_daily_recommendation dr )
SELECT id, name, subtitle, birth_date, death_date, dynasty, birth_place, biography, works, image_url, created_at, updated_at FROM t_historical_figure
